description:
there should be a repository of APIs. 
So that LLMs can interact with the realworld. 
Maybe MCPs are the right thing. 
Does booking have an MCP? 
Otherwise we could build a website that adapts APIs like the one from booking to MCP

status.comment: Researched MCP ecosystem. Answer: Yes, booking.com has multiple MCPs (hotels_mcp_server, Bright Data Booking MCP, Apify scrapers, flights-mcp-server). Found 1200+ MCPs in community directories (mcp-awesome.com). Created comprehensive research doc (docs/MCP_RESEARCH.md) covering existing MCPs, categories, and opportunities. Proposed next steps: (1) Build social media MCP for Twitter/Instagram to complement experience-mining pipeline, (2) Document existing aimparency MCP implementation, (3) Create MCP template for future integrations.
